subject: airport taxi rank
summary: Multiple female travelers reported the official airport taxi rank felt organized and safer than random curbside offers.

subject: old quarter pharmacy
summary: Travelers mentioned staff were helpful when they needed a bright, staffed place to pause and regroup.

subject: Ta Hien beer corner at night
summary: Very crowded and loud on weekend nights, which most travelers found reassuring (lots of people around), though pickpocket awareness was mentioned.

subject: Hoan Kiem Lake evening walk
summary: Popular and well-lit in the early evening; travelers noted it gets much quieter after midnight and recommended pairing it with a friend that late.

subject: 24h convenience stores in Old Quarter
summary: Circle K and VinMart branches were mentioned as reliable, well-lit stops for water or a quick snack late at night.

subject: Long Bien area at night
summary: General guidance from travelers was to avoid walking alone in this area late at night; better visited during the day or in a group.

subject: My Khe Beach promenade
summary: Consistently rated as relaxed and safe by female travelers, with a well-lit walking path and many hostels nearby.

subject: Dragon Bridge weekend nights
summary: Very crowded on Saturday/Sunday nights for the fire-breathing show; travelers found the crowd reassuring but noted watching bags closely.

subject: Han Market (Cho Han) daytime
summary: Travelers found daytime visits straightforward; a few mentioned light haggling was expected and normal, not a red flag on its own.

subject: Bui Vien walking street
summary: Backpacker-heavy and loud but busy and well-lit; multiple reports of pushy drink promoters and inflated bar tabs, so travelers recommended confirming prices before ordering.

subject: Ben Thanh Market
summary: Common tourist stop; travelers reported initial asking prices are often inflated for foreigners and bargaining is normal and expected there.

subject: Nguyen Hue walking street at night
summary: Wide, open, well-lit pedestrian street popular with local families in the evening; rated as one of the more comfortable areas for a solo night walk.

subject: Tran Phu beachfront street
summary: Main tourist strip with hotels and lighting along the whole street; travelers felt comfortable walking it in the early evening, less so very late at night.

subject: Nha Trang night market
summary: Popular with tourists; some reports of overpriced souvenirs and seafood, travelers suggested checking prices at a couple of stalls before buying.

subject: Duong Dong night market
summary: Busy and touristy, well-lit with lots of food stalls; a few travelers mentioned confirming seafood prices upfront since some stalls charge tourists more.

subject: Long Beach (Bai Truong) resort strip
summary: Quiet, resort-dominated area; travelers generally rated it as low-stress but noted it's spread out, so having transport arranged for the return trip helps.

subject: late night walking street
summary: Crowded and visible in general across major tourist walking streets, but some reports mention aggressive upselling and bag awareness concerns.
